ce_name: Warner Bros. Studio Tour London Tickets
root_cause: CVR improved +0.31pp overall (C2O +4.50pp from Easter/spring high-intent planners + price dip on main product), but S2C fell −1.13pp concentrated on mobile — near-term weekend slots selling out 2–3 days in advance left last-minute mobile visitors with no available dates. Structural S2C gap vs LY (~15–17pp below) suggests tighter WBSL allotment management in 2026 vs 2025. Re-evaluated 2026-05-05: original 26/35 was wrong on T1 (Language IS in ruled-out block; cited gap was factually incorrect); revised to 27/35.
